positive: A highly detailed, central composition design featuring a stylized celestial mountain range shrouded in glowing nebulae. The mountains should have crisp, clean silhouettes resembling jagged crystalline structures, rendered in deep sapphire blue, vibrant amethyst, and metallic gold veins. A full moon with an ethereal glow is positioned centrally above the peaks, radiating soft light onto the landscape. Incorporate abstract, swirling constellations and minimalist zodiac glyphs floating through the atmosphere. Style: Highly stylized vector art merged with cosmic watercolor washes. Composition: Symmetrical and balanced, perfect for a chest print. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting emphasizing the silhouettes and contrast against the glowing voids. Color Direction: Deep jewel tones (blue, purple, gold) with high contrast.
